title: Initial setup
summary: Initialized Rust project with TUI dependencies, linting tools, test framework, and CI pipeline
details: Created single-crate Rust project (ralph-tui) with binary and lib structure
Configured ratatui 0.29, crossterm 0.28, tokio 1.x, serde 1.x dependencies
Set up rustfmt, clippy with strict linting (unsafe_code=forbid, all warnings)
Configured cargo-deny v2 for dependency auditing with license and security checks
Implemented unit and integration test framework with passing tests
Created GitHub Actions CI pipeline with build, test, lint, and security checks
Added E2E CLI tests using assert_cmd and predicates to verify binary execution
All verifications passing: build, test, fmt, clippy, cargo-deny

title: Core TUI framework
summary: Implemented core TUI framework with terminal management, async event loop, keyboard handling, resizable panels, and graceful shutdown
details: Implemented terminal init/restore with crossterm backend, TTY detection, and panic recovery
Created App state struct with running flag and resizable panel heights
Added async event handler using tokio channels and spawn
Designed keyboard event handling with hardcoded keybindings (q/Esc/Ctrl+C quit, Ctrl+Up/Down resize)
Implemented graceful shutdown with Ctrl+C signal handling
Created 3-panel layout (header, main, footer) with keyboard-driven resizing
All verifications passing: build, test, fmt, clippy, cargo-deny
